official_functions.role: Construct the official empty literal Component reason fixture
Construct the official Configuration clientbound disconnect packet fixture
Write the official Configuration clientbound disconnect body
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed disconnect packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed disconnect packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read the decoded disconnect reason from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the disconnect reason body.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundDisconnectPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundDisconnectPacket preserves the empty literal Component reason fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, reason fixture, reason text, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove UI disconnect handling, screen flow, Configuration completion, registry hydration, Play entry, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer UI disconnect handling, screen flow, Configuration-to-Play readiness, registry hydration, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
